topic: low-vigour rootstocks and vine growth control
trigger_keywords: controlar el vigor de la vid sin disminuir el rendimiento
uso de portainjertos de bajo vigor

steps.label: cause
steps.text: The grape variety is grafted onto a rootstock selected for low or moderate vigour.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The root system limits vegetative growth relative to a high-vigour rootstock while maintaining an appropriate crop under suitable conditions.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Canopy growth is easier to control without using crop removal as the primary tool.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Canopy growth is easier to control without using crop removal as the primary tool.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
